name: Nova Scotia Potato Dressing
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Potato, chopped into small cubes
Part cooking liquid with less fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes for about 20 minutes or until soft enough to mash.
2. Place onions in a large microwave-safe bowl and cook on high for 1 minute or until margarine is melted. Stir frequently.
3. Add about one-third of the cooked potatoes at a time back into the bowl, mashing as you go.
4. Sprinkle seasoning over the mixture gradually while continuously mashing to incorporate evenly.
5. Blend well until fully combined and season to taste if desired.
6. Divide into meal-sized portions; extra can be frozen for later use.
7. Reheat in the microwave or oven before serving very hot.
This dressing has been a family favorite for about six generations, served with every turkey dinner. It's versatile enough to accompany any plain meat.
